title: 11 herbal tinctures to calm dry cough in asthmatics
description: Euphrasia officinalis tinctures have been traditionally used to help alleviate dry coughs, and it's worth exploring why. The plant contains iridoid glycosides, specifically euphrasperoside, which has anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe the mucous membranes in the throat, reducing coughing. Additionally, Euphrasia officinalis has antitussive properties, which means it can help calm the cough reflex.  If you're considering using Euphrasia officinalis tinctures for a dry cou...
